creator: mjl@luckie.org.nz
text:
Created attachment 238170
update scamper to 20211212d

Chances since 20211212b:

https://mailman.caida.org/pipermail/scamper-announce/2022-September/000026.html
https://mailman.caida.org/pipermail/scamper-announce/2022-November/000027.html

scamper:
* fix build without OpenSSL
* add tcp-syn-sport method to ping, document in scamper(1) manual page

sc_remoted:
* fix build without OpenSSL

documentation:
* document trace json object in sc_warts2json(1) manual page
